specific_question: What customer incentive could be tied to direct online purchases if Elexion were to switch by the end of 2026?
answer: If Elexion Automotive were to switch to the direct sales model by the end of 2026, they could partner up with a national charging network provider to include complimentary charging for direct online purchases.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
